untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of multi-bar uptrend, counter-trend correction phase, and lower-low trap formation, which require multi-candle pattern recognition and contextual regime detection not expressible through single-bar indicator conditions. Additionally, cross-asset confirmation (Bank Nifty strength during Nifty correction) requires correlated instrument data not available in single-asset indicator set. Support level identification and minimum trend duration/correction depth parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no guidance provided.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close > sma_50 to approximate uptrend continuation and low < prev_low to approximate lower-low formation, but the core pattern logic (identifying when correction ends and trend resumes) requires sequential pattern matching unavailable in indicator-only framework.
